Class DexpiLayoutEngine.EquipmentPosition

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.processmodel.dexpi.DexpiLayoutEngine.EquipmentPosition
Enclosing class:
DexpiLayoutEngine
static final class DexpiLayoutEngine.EquipmentPosition extends Object
Holds computed position data for a single equipment item.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    (package private) final double
    rotation
    Rotation angle in degrees (0 = no rotation).
    (package private) final double
    scaleX
    Scale factor in X direction.
    (package private) final double
    scaleY
    Scale factor in Y direction.
    (package private) final double
    x
    X coordinate in drawing space.
    (package private) final double
    y
    Y coordinate in drawing space.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    EquipmentPosition(double x, double y, double scaleX, double scaleY)
    Creates a new equipment position with no rotation.
    EquipmentPosition(double x, double y, double scaleX, double scaleY, double rotation)
    Creates a new equipment position with rotation.

  • Method Summary

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • x

      final double x
      X coordinate in drawing space.

    • y

      final double y
      Y coordinate in drawing space.

    • scaleX

      final double scaleX
      Scale factor in X direction.

    • scaleY

      final double scaleY
      Scale factor in Y direction.

    • rotation

      final double rotation
      Rotation angle in degrees (0 = no rotation).

  • Constructor Details

    • EquipmentPosition

      EquipmentPosition(double x, double y, double scaleX, double scaleY)
      Creates a new equipment position with no rotation.
      Parameters:
      x - x coordinate
      y - y coordinate
      scaleX - x scale factor
      scaleY - y scale factor

    • EquipmentPosition

      EquipmentPosition(double x, double y, double scaleX, double scaleY, double rotation)
      Creates a new equipment position with rotation.
      Parameters:
      x - x coordinate
      y - y coordinate
      scaleX - x scale factor
      scaleY - y scale factor
      rotation - rotation angle in degrees
